context: Guidelines for tracking business expenses at Jesse Page Photography for quarterly reconciliation with Ravi Krishnamurthy at Greenpoint Tax & Advisory.
policy_name: Freelance Photography Business Expense Categorization Policy

validation_rules.action: Flag entry for Jesse's review before quarterly reconciliation with Ravi
validation_rules.notes: Personal-use portion (e.g., Adobe subscription split between client and personal work) excluded per IRS Schedule C rules
validation_rules.requirement: Receipt attached to the entry within 14 days of the transaction
validation_rules.rule: Deductible business expenses require a dated receipt with vendor name and shoot or project reference
